flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Midland College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.5k → $10.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Midland College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (17.1% vs 23.8%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Midland College rose 27% between 2007 and 2010 (79.0% → 100.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Midland College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8k → 5.5k).
